rationale: Empirical read-only review of local PR refs found the fixes real and the new tests non-vacuous. PR #160 adds six targeted tests: stale-branch escapes retain a strict baseline, non-README root docs fail link-checks, dirty rewrite crashes are resumable before clean-tree preconditions, and downstream canonical/legacy read/write paths remain byte-identical with no flat flip. PR #159 sets ADR-0039 Accepted, fixes live docs while preserving historical/transition mentions, adds accurate opt-in/non-breaking release notes, parses .goreleaser.yml with ^Merge excluded, syncs bead state, and files the lifecycle follow-up. I could not independently confirm live CI/mergeability because gh cannot reach api.github.com from this sandbox; no code/doc blocker found in the at-ref review.
